---
title: "Movie is another extension of life"
listing:
  - id: movie
    contents: "**/*/index.qmd"
    type: default
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, author, reading-time]
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: cloud
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 36
date-format: iso     
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
toc: true
---

::: {#movie}
:::
